items.title: Cleaner List Forms
items.description: Creating and editing lists now uses warmer carded sections, clearer fields, and a refreshed live preview.

items.title: Better Color Picking
items.description: List colors now start with grocery-friendly greens and orange, with clearer selected states.

items.title: Refreshed Empty States
items.description: Empty list and empty item screens now match the updated Baskit visual style.

items.title: Consistent Warm Surfaces
items.description: Supporting screens now better match the refreshed home and list detail experience.
